hero.headline: Everything You Need to Feel Good
hero.subheadline: MindBloom is a cozy mental wellness app guided by Blaze, your warm AI fox companion. Mini courses, breathing exercises, yoga, and daily check-ins — all in one place.

items.title: Mini Courses
items.description: Bite-sized lessons on anxiety, sleep, confidence, and more.

items.title: Breathing Exercises
items.description: Guided breathwork to calm your nervous system in minutes.

items.title: Yoga Sessions
items.description: Gentle flows for all levels — morning stretches to evening wind-downs.

items.title: Blaze AI Companion
items.description: Your personal fox guide who listens, checks in, and cheers you on.

items.title: Daily Check-ins
items.description: Track your mood and celebrate small wins every day.

items.title: Beta Launch — Now Live!
items.description: MindBloom launched on Google Play at the end of June. Download free and meet Blaze.

items.title: Community Wellness Challenge
items.description: A 7-day guided wellness challenge inside the app. Join thousands of bloomers.

items.title: New Course Drop: Sleep Better
items.description: A brand new mini course on sleep hygiene and evening routines drops in the app.
